Package com.mcconihay.nasamediaexplorer.entity

Class ItemEntity

java.lang.Object
com.mcconihay.nasamediaexplorer.entity.ItemEntity
@Entity public class ItemEntity extends Object
Represents a media item retrieved from a NASA data source.

Each item is uniquely identified by the combination of source API and NASA ID. The entity stores metadata used for search, display, and user interaction.
